info.title: CollisionSpike DVSA Enrichment
info.description: Custom connector over the DVSA enrichment Azure Function. The Function calls the DVSA MOT History API directly (Microsoft Entra client_credentials + X-API-Key) and the DVLA Vehicle Enquiry API directly (API-key) — no gateway, all-Microsoft. It returns vehicle make/model (get_vehicle_summary) and a current mileage estimate (current_mileage_estimate). Enrichment is advisory and staff-reviewed; the mileage estimate is computed ONLY when the parsed document has no mileage (document authoritative, ADR-0006).

post.summary: Enrich a case from DVSA/DVLA by VRM
post.description: Returns suggested vehicle make/model and (only when document_has_mileage is false) a current mileage estimate. Always returns 200 with a warnings array; enrichment never blocks intake.

400.description: Invalid request (missing vrm or non-JSON body).

reference.description: Optional case reference for correlation/audit (not used in lookup).

document_has_mileage.description: True if the parsed instruction already has a mileage. When true, the DVSA mileage estimate is skipped (document is authoritative). Defaults to true.

vehicle_model.description: Suggested vehicle model (maps to the EVA vehicle_model field).

current_mileage.description: Estimated current mileage (digits). Present only when document_has_mileage was false and an estimate was available.

mileage_unit.description: Always 'Miles' (MOT odometer history is normalised to miles).

mileage_confidence.description: Confidence band for the mileage estimate.

warnings.description: Human-readable advisories (e.g. lookup failed, mileage skipped).

apiKeyHeader.name: x-functions-key
apiKeyHeader.description: Azure Functions host/function key. Stored as a connection secret in Power Platform, never in this spec.
